columns.name: user_id
columns.comment: UUID of the user who answered

columns.name: is_active
columns.comment: Whether the chat limit is active

columns.name: user_id
columns.comment: User ID who liked the comment

columns.name: user_id
columns.comment: User ID who created the comment

columns.name: draft_id
columns.comment: Draft ID field is immutable once set

columns.name: user_id
columns.comment: User ID field is immutable once set

columns.name: holiday_type
columns.comment: Specifies if the holiday is mandatory for all or optional for individuals.

columns.name: holiday_type
columns.comment: Specifies if the holiday is mandatory for all or optional for individuals.

columns.name: calendar_year
columns.comment: Year extracted from holiday_date for efficient querying

columns.name: source
columns.comment: The source of the balance adjustment (e.g., Manual by HR, System Lapsed, etc.)

columns.name: availed_optional_holidays
columns.comment: Tracks the count of optional holidays taken in this period.

columns.name: compensatory_days_earned
columns.comment: Tracks compensatory days earned, e.g., by working on a mandatory holiday.

columns.name: optional_holiday_policy_enabled
columns.comment: If true, enables the special rules for optional holidays.

columns.name: max_optional_holidays_allowed
columns.comment: The number of optional holidays a user can take before needing a compensatory day.

columns.name: allow_compensatory_from_holidays
columns.comment: If true, allows users to "earn" a day by working on a mandatory holiday to take an extra optional holiday.

columns.name: policy_name
columns.comment: Human-readable name for this leave policy

columns.name: description
columns.comment: Optional description of the leave policy

columns.name: country
columns.comment: Country code or name (e.g., India, Canada)

columns.name: availed_optional_holiday_id
columns.comment: If this leave corresponds to an optional holiday, this holds the ID of that holiday.

columns.name: start_date_period
columns.comment: Whether the first day is a full day, first half, or second half

columns.name: end_date_period
columns.comment: Whether the last day is a full day, first half, or second half

columns.name: gender_applicability
columns.comment: Specifies if this leave type is restricted to a specific gender.

columns.name: leave_name
columns.comment: Name of the leave type (e.g., Annual Leave, Sick Leave)

columns.name: description
columns.comment: Optional description of the leave type

columns.name: is_paid
columns.comment: Indicates if this leave type is paid or unpaid

columns.name: is_active
columns.comment: Indicates if this leave type is active and available for use

columns.name: field_name
columns.comment: Human-readable display name of the field (max 80 chars)

columns.name: field_key
columns.comment: Programmatic key used in code (max 100 chars)

columns.name: description
columns.comment: Optional description explaining the purpose of the field

columns.name: module
columns.comment: The HRMS module this field belongs to (e.g. leave, attendance)

columns.name: is_active
columns.comment: Whether this field is currently active

columns.name: user_id
columns.comment: User ID who created the post

columns.name: key_results
columns.comment: Key results for the sub objective
